core_principle: Win with 7-2 offsuit: detect 7-2 → execute aggressive bluff sequence. Normal hands: play optimal EV-based strategy.

bluff_27_override.detection: hole cards contain exactly 7 and 2, different suits
bluff_27_override.preflop_shove_condition: if facing a raise (not all-in) and call_amount <= 0.30 * stack; else if facing all-in, fold
bluff_27_override.ev_math: open 3BB (48% fold = +0.72BB) then flop all-in (95% fold = +5.7BB) total fold prob = 97.4%, EV = +5.2BB per attempt
bluff_27_override.notes: Do NOT bluff on 3+ streets — go all-in on flop for max fold equity. If board pairs our 7 or 2, defer to normal strategy.

preflop.call_3bet_range: standard optimal, adjust for bot fold tendency

river.fold_to_raise: if equity below required pot odds

adjustments.exploit_all_in_fold: use all-in only when hand meets threshold (0.82) to exploit 95% fold rate
adjustments.exploit_postflop_call: value bet heavy, no bluffs because bots rarely fold
adjustments.short_stack_adjustment: when stack < 20BB, reduce all-in threshold to 0.62
adjustments.note: Do not over-conserve chips for 7-2 opportunities; optimal play on normal hands yields highest overall EV

pot_odds.call_rule: call when equity >= required equity based on pot odds
pot_odds.bluff_catch_frequency: never call with marginal hands unless pot odds dictate
pot_odds.fold_to_aggression: fold when equity < required equity, even if deceptive

short_stack.note: If stack < 20BB, shove with any EHS >= 0.62 (ICM push-fold)
